test.name: FAN search — Flynn family as witnesses in Schuylkill County records
test.description: Full-text search for Flynn family members appearing as witnesses or associates in Schuylkill County records. Tests the FAN (Family, Associates, Neighbors) research path — searching for the subject not in their own records but as named in other people's records.

input.user_message: Run separate full-text searches for Thomas Flynn AND for Patrick Flynn appearing as witnesses in Schuylkill County records — both names must be queried.

judge_context: Should construct a full-text query targeting Flynn family names in witness/associate contexts — typically requires phrase quoting or proximity operators since 'Flynn' as a witness appears in others' records rather than the family's own

Should include name variants relevant to the time period and Irish-origin community: 'Thomas Flynn', 'Patrick Flynn', and possibly variants like 'Flynne' or 'Phlynn' that appeared in 19th-century transcriptions
Should report the fixture's results as FAN evidence rather than as direct subject evidence — the value is in establishing community networks, not in confirming Patrick's birth or parentage directly
